# Generated automatically by MapsforgeSchemaSnapshotTest.
# Do not edit by hand — regenerate by deleting and re-running the test.

class org.mapsforge.core.model.BoundingBox
    public final double maxLatitude
    public final double maxLongitude
    public final double minLatitude
    public final double minLongitude

class org.mapsforge.core.model.LatLong
    public final double latitude
    public final double longitude

class org.mapsforge.core.model.Tag
    public final java.lang.String key
    public final int keyCode
    public final java.lang.String value
    public final int valueCode

class org.mapsforge.core.model.Tile
    private org.mapsforge.core.model.BoundingBox boundingBox
    public final long mapSize
    private org.mapsforge.core.model.Point origin
    public final int tileSize
    public final int tileX
    public final int tileY
    public final byte zoomLevel

class org.mapsforge.map.datastore.MapReadResult
    private final java.util.Set<java.lang.Integer> hashPois
    private final java.util.Set<java.lang.Integer> hashWays
    public boolean isWater
    public java.util.List<org.mapsforge.map.datastore.PointOfInterest> pointOfInterests
    public java.util.List<org.mapsforge.map.datastore.Way> ways

class org.mapsforge.map.datastore.PointOfInterest
    public final byte layer
    public final org.mapsforge.core.model.LatLong position
    public final java.util.List<org.mapsforge.core.model.Tag> tags

class org.mapsforge.map.datastore.Way
    public final org.mapsforge.core.model.LatLong labelPosition
    public final org.mapsforge.core.model.LatLong[][] latLongs
    public final byte layer
    public final java.util.List<org.mapsforge.core.model.Tag> tags

class org.mapsforge.map.reader.header.MapFileInfo
    public final org.mapsforge.core.model.BoundingBox boundingBox
    public final java.lang.String comment
    public final java.lang.String createdBy
    public final boolean debugFile
    public final long fileSize
    public final int fileVersion
    public final java.lang.String languagesPreference
    public final long mapDate
    public final byte numberOfSubFiles
    public final org.mapsforge.core.model.Tag[] poiTags
    public final java.lang.String projectionName
    public final org.mapsforge.core.model.LatLong startPosition
    public final java.lang.Byte startZoomLevel
    public final int tilePixelSize
    public final org.mapsforge.core.model.Tag[] wayTags
    public final byte zoomLevelMax
    public final byte zoomLevelMin
